hero.title: Share more, own less, and rent from people in your local community.
hero.subtitle: Support neighbors and build trust through sharing.
hero.imageAlt: People sharing items in a local community

featured.empty: New items from our community will appear here soon.

categories.empty: Your marketplace categories will appear here.

step1.title: Log in or Sign up
step1.text: Log in or create an account to start your journey.

step2.title: Find What You Need
step2.text: Search or browse items near you by category and location.

step3.title: Choose Dates
step3.text: Select the rental period and check availability instantly.

step4.title: Send a Request
step4.text: Request the item or book instantly in just a few clicks.

step5.title: Pick Up & Use
step5.text: Meet the owner, pick up the item, and enjoy using it.

step6.title: Return & Review
step6.text: Return the item on time and leave a review.

step1.title: Create Your Listing
step1.text: Add photos, a description, and daily pricing in a few minutes.

step2.title: Receive Requests
step2.text: Renters in your area will find your listing and ask to borrow.

step3.title: Approve a Booking
step3.text: Accept the dates that work for you and lock in the rental.

step4.title: Hand Over the Item
step4.text: Meet the renter, verify their ID, and hand the item over.

step5.title: Get Paid
step5.text: Payouts are released after pickup with transparent pricing.

step6.title: Review & Repeat
step6.text: Get the item back, leave a review, and keep earning.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.helpText: Send us an email & we’ll get back to you as soon as possible!

q1.question: How does renting work?
q1.answer: Find an item, pick your dates, send a request, and meet the owner to pick it up. Return it on time and leave a review.

q2.question: Is it safe to rent from other people?
q2.answer: Every renter goes through verification, and every transaction is tracked. You always see who you are renting from before confirming.

q3.question: What happens if an item gets damaged?
q3.answer: We offer damage protection on every confirmed rental. Report any issue within 24 hours of returning the item and we will help resolve it.

q4.question: How do payments work?
q4.answer: Payments are processed securely when your booking is confirmed, and owners receive their payout after the pickup is verified.

q5.question: Can I cancel a rental?
q5.answer: Free cancellation up to two days before the rental starts. After that, a partial refund may apply depending on the owner’s policy.

q6.question: What do I need to list an item for rent?
q6.answer: Create an account, add at least one clear photo, a short description, and a daily price. You can start earning within minutes.
